testcase.name: should log config change to JSONL file
should fall back to CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env var
should produce no stdout (logging is a side-effect)
should log tool failure to JSONL
should track consecutive failures for same tool
should reset counter for different tool
should emit escalation at threshold (5+ consecutive)
should detect 429 rate limit errors immediately
should detect rate limit keyword variations
should save checkpoint on rate limit
should not match keywords inside code blocks
should not match keywords inside URLs
should not match keywords inside quoted strings
should not activate for informational questions
should not activate for explain requests
should produce no output for unrelated prompts
should suggest turbo for parallel task descriptions
should log Bash denial with command summary
should log file-op denial with file_path
should truncate long Bash commands to 200 chars
should produce no stdout (logging is a side-effect)
should log tool usage to JSONL file
should record was_error=true for failed tools
should fall back to SESSION_ID env var
should produce no stdout (logging is a side-effect)
should DENY: curl pipe to bash
should DENY: wget pipe to sh
should ALLOW: git add . && git commit -m "test"
should add branch verification hint for git push
should add history warning for git reset
should add database hint for ALTER TABLE
should add credential hint for TOKEN references
should add container hint for docker system prune
should fail closed on malformed JSON (ask for review)
should fail open with empty command
should fail open with missing tool_input
should use env session ID as fallback
should produce no stdout when no state to preserve
should log task creation with task_id and subject
should accept id as alternative to task_id
should truncate long subjects to 200 chars
should produce no stdout (logging is a side-effect)
should truncate long result summaries to 500 chars
should log post_compact event when no checkpoint exists
should log checkpoint_found=true when fixture exists
should emit system-reminder stdout when checkpoint exists
should produce no stdout when no checkpoint found
should exit 0 with malformed JSON (falls back to env session)
should log error string to JSONL
should fall back to stop_reason when error missing
should truncate long errors to 500 chars
should return valid JSON with result field
should skip when CLAUDE_AGENT_TYPE is set
should skip when CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR contains agents path
should NOT skip for normal sessions
should NOT debounce after window expires
should output SKILL.md content wrapped in system-reminder
should use DA env var for title
should set tab title from assistant message
should handle message with markdown formatting
should include stop_hook_active field without issues
should write checkpoint to JSONL on valid message
should not write checkpoint when no last_assistant_message
should allow on parse error (fail open)
should warn when editing unread file
should not warn for test files
should not warn for files that were read
should always use advisory allow, never deny
should allow Write to any file

testcase.name: all configured hook commands should reference existing files
CORE skill should have workflows directory
skills should not have node_modules at top level
hooks should have shebang for bun
Factor 1: Should have CORE skill as single system prompt
Factor 8: Skills should declare context type (same/fork)
Factor 10: Should have history directory with organization
Factor 12: Hooks follow simple input/output pattern
should have CLAUDE.md in qara root
should have context/ directory with includes
CLAUDE.md should be minimal (JIT loading via CORE)
pai-paths module should export all required paths
pai-paths paths should exist on filesystem
returns skill name for files in skills dir
returns undefined for files outside skills dir
extracts TABLE entries from SKILL.md (security table)
resolves bare filenames within same skill
findOrphans — CORE/SKILL.md is NOT reported as orphan
findOrphans — no SKILL.md files reported as orphans
findOrphans — broken references include edges to non-existent files
analyzeImpact — CONSTITUTION.md has CORE/SKILL.md as direct dependent
detectCycles — returns empty array on healthy graph
detectCycles — detects cycle in synthetic cyclic graph
scan --json produces valid JSON matching ScanReport shape
orphans --json produces valid JSON matching OrphanReport shape
dot output contains digraph and expected node names
context7 entry has correct command and args
context7 does not leak API keys in mcp.json
should log start event to tracking file
should increment activeSubagents when mode is active
should log stop event to tracking file
should decrement activeSubagents and append to completedSubagents
should not go below 0 for activeSubagents
returns empty array for empty input
returns empty array for entries without input_summary (backward compat)
computes start, end, and duration_ms correctly
tools_used has unique tools in order of first appearance
input_summaries includes all summaries for the session
handles session_id "unknown" with time-gap heuristic — within 5 min = 1 session
handles session_id "unknown" with time-gap heuristic — >5 min gap = 2 sessions
mixed known and unknown session_ids are handled separately
returns empty array for empty input
returns empty array when no errors exist
returns empty array for pre-enrichment entries (no input_summary)
detects Bash→Read recovery on same file
detects Write→Edit recovery on same file
detects Grep→Glob recovery on same pattern
allows up to 3 intervening calls between error and recovery
does NOT detect recovery when more than 3 intervening calls
does NOT detect recovery when gap > 5 minutes
records gap between error and recovery
returns empty array for empty input
returns empty array when no errors
returns empty array when errors < 3 occurrences
detects repeated failure at threshold of 3
groups by tool AND similar input_summary (shared 20+ char prefix)
does NOT group errors with fewer than 20-char shared prefix
groups errors sharing the same file path
classifies reading when >50% of tools are Read/Grep/Glob
classifies writing when >50% of tools are Write/Edit
classifies testing when >30% Bash with "test" in input_summaries
classifies mixed for no dominant pattern
computes tool_diversity as unique tools / tool_count
handles zero tool_count without dividing by zero
should track first failure without escalation
should increment consecutive failures for same tool
should reset counter on different tool
should detect all rate limit patterns on first occurrence
should include tool name in rate limit guidance
should skip rate limit on normal non-429 errors
should log rate limit event to checkpoint-events.jsonl
should fail closed on error (ask for manual review)
should block curl pipe to shell
should add additionalContext for git push
should handle unexpected input gracefully (non-Bash = approve)
should score > 0 when working-memory.ts exists with exports
should score > 0 with maxScore 12 when infrastructure exists
should score > 0 with maxScore 15 when infrastructure exists
should score > 0 with maxScore 12 when infrastructure exists
should be able to read CORE skill
should have valid hook command paths
all configured hook commands should point to existing files
should detect 'drive' keyword and inject skill
should produce no output for unmatched prompts
should not match keywords inside URLs
should not match keywords inside code blocks
should not match keywords inside file paths
should not match keywords inside quoted strings
should skip informational mentions with 'what is'
should skip informational mentions with 'how does'
should create mode-state.json when activating drive
should set maxIterations from route defaults
should set planPath when cruise is activated with a plan file
should leave planPath null when cruise is activated without a plan file
should not set prdPath when activating cruise without a PRD (bug fix)
should still set prdPath when activating drive (regression guard)
should use first match when multiple keywords present
should search by keyword in input_summary
should return empty for non-matching query
parses complete experiment with all fields
parses active experiment without ended date
parses minimal experiment with only required fields
returns null for content with no frontmatter delimiters
returns null when required field id is missing
returns empty array for non-existent directory
returns empty array for empty directory
error_rate is 0 when no tools are recorded
tolerates runner throwing for a day (skips that day)
baseline and experiment are preserved by reference
pct_change is 0 when baseline value is 0 (no division by zero)
delta keys match all numeric PeriodMetrics fields except days
should use session ID from env if not provided
should create learning file with header on first append
should return empty strings for missing files
should return content for existing files
should return empty string when no memory exists
should only include sections with content
should move memory to archive subdirectory
should be a no-op if no memory exists
should keep memory separate between sessions
should not emit reminder when no meaningful state exists
should emit reminder when working memory exists
should exit 0 on malformed JSON input
rejects empty, too short, or too long messages
matches UTC timestamp to Sydney date
should write and read back PRD correctly
should return null when file does not exist
should return null for malformed JSON
should return null for JSON missing required fields
should return null for JSON with empty stories array
should accept valid PRD with all fields
should reject PRD without stories array
should return stories with passes: false
should return empty array when all pass
should return false when some stories fail
should return true when all stories pass
should return true for empty stories
should return stories that are currently passing
should return empty when none are passing
should set passes=true and verified fields
should throw for unknown story id
should set passes=false and clear verified fields
should throw for unknown story id
should write valid JSON that can be re-read
no Active Hints section → empty array
healthy session: read before every edit → ratio high, 0% blind edits
degraded session: edits without reads → high blind edit %
multi-session: tracks read sets independently per session
non-file tools are ignored for read:edit tracking
should detect a repeated 3-tool sequence across sessions
should not return sequences appearing in only 1 session
should return empty for empty input
should detect recurring topic hints not matching existing routes
should exclude topics matching existing routes
should return empty for empty input
should score high for multi-day, multi-session, action-including sequence
should score low for read-only sequence
should give bonus for Write/Bash action tools
should not have any hidden directories as skills

should have context field (same or fork)
should have context field (same or fork)
should have context field (same or fork)
should have context field (same or fork)
should have context field (same or fork)

should have context field (same or fork)
should have context field (same or fork)
should have skills with context: same
should have no skills with unknown context
CORE workflows should be markdown files
skills with assets/ should have valid files
skill directories should use kebab-case or UPPERCASE
system skills should have system- prefix
all symlinked skills should resolve to valid directories
should handle missing state sources gracefully
should produce valid JSON checkpoint file
should return null for missing session
should return null for malformed JSON
should return null for missing required fields
should be a no-op if no checkpoint exists
should save and load identical data
should not have docs/ directory (SKILL.md forbids reading it)
should return true for React in dependencies
should return true for React in devDependencies
should return false for non-React project
should return false for empty dependencies
should return null for non-React framework
should return null for null input
should return false when not installed
should detect react-grab script in Next.js app layout
should return false when script not in layout
should detect react-grab in Vite index.html
should return null layoutFile when no files found
should return isReact: false for non-React project
should return isReact: true, installed: false for bare React project
should include isReact: true for React projects
should include isReact: false for non-React projects

should have --grab flag in argument parsing
should verify grab for test commands
should keep dev as alias for start
should have framework-specific error messages in verify_grab_setup
should mention react-grab in component debug recipe
should list all MCP tool categories
should check project .mcp.json at the given projectPath
should NOT double-invoke react-grab-detect.mjs in verify_grab_setup
should use cached config in verify_grab_setup (reactGrab field)
should return cached config on subsequent get_dev_config calls
cmd_verify should detect React/Svelte and pass flags
should parse --react and --svelte from process.argv in CLI section
should return "unknown" when no recognized deps are present
should return null for null scripts
should return null for empty scripts object
should return null when no priority keys are present
should return the dev script value when "dev" key exists
should fall back to "start" when "dev" is absent
should fall back to "serve" when neither dev nor start is present
should return null for null devScript
should return null when script has no port flag
should throw ENOENT error for non-existent directory
should throw parse error for invalid JSON
should return parsed object for valid package.json
should return detected: false for non-existent directory

does not add recommendation when all agents are specialized

exits 0 on valid input with no duplicates

allows writing a NEW file (non-existent path)

should handle mixed pass/fail/skip in one suite

should fail on both regression AND coverage decrease
should handle comparison without coverage data
should format negative coverage delta as FAIL
should format new and removed test counts
should show usage with no args
should error when parse --file is missing

should error when compare --baseline or --current is missing
should error when compare has --current but no --baseline
should compare two identical XML files and pass
should compare with lcov coverage files
should pass when comparing a realistic XML with itself

should pass when only non-critical scenarios are unmapped

should exit 0 with malformed JSON (swallows errors)
should exit 0 with error tool result

should refuse extension when maxExtensions exhausted

testcase.name: should handle prompt with only stop words
should handle special characters in prompt
should handle verbs ending in e

testcase.name: should handle regular verbs

testcase.name: should handle irregular verbs

testcase.name: should handle CVC pattern verbs

testcase.name: should not double-convert already past tense verbs
testcase.classname: past tense conversion > generateTabTitle > Tab Titles

testcase.name: should use Completed for empty first word

testcase.name: should not over-pad short titles
testcase.classname: default fallback words > generateTabTitle > Tab Titles

testcase.name: should not throw when called with a title
should handle special characters in title
should use ghostty escape sequences for ghostty terminal
should use kitty escape sequences for kitty terminal
should use generic escape sequences for unknown terminal
should write and read back state correctly
testcase.classname: writeTDDState + readTDDState roundtrip > TDD State Management

testcase.name: should auto-compute timestamps
testcase.classname: writeTDDState + readTDDState roundtrip > TDD State Management

testcase.name: should use CLAUDE_SESSION_ID for session
testcase.classname: writeTDDState + readTDDState roundtrip > TDD State Management

testcase.name: should accept explicit sessionId
testcase.classname: writeTDDState + readTDDState roundtrip > TDD State Management

testcase.name: should store feature and phase
testcase.classname: writeTDDState + readTDDState roundtrip > TDD State Management

testcase.name: should return null when no state file exists
should return null when state is expired
should return null when session doesn't match
should return state when session is 'unknown' (wildcard)
should return null when file doesn't exist
should return state even if expired
should return null for malformed JSON
should return null when active is false
should transition phase from RED to GREEN
should transition phase from GREEN to REFACTOR
should extend TTL on phase update
should throw when no active state exists
should not throw when file doesn't exist
should return true for valid state
should return false when TTL expired
should return false when session doesn't match
should return true when sessionId is 'unknown' (wildcard)
should show help with no args
should error on phase with no active state
should create directory if it does not exist
should not throw if directory already exists
should create file and append entry
should append multiple entries as separate lines
should return empty string for undefined
should truncate long strings within maxLen budget
should respect custom maxLen (hard truncate when too small for suffix)
should include suffix when maxLen has room
should export HOOKS_DIR as subdirectory of PAI_DIR
should export SKILLS_DIR as subdirectory of PAI_DIR
should export AGENTS_DIR as subdirectory of PAI_DIR
should export HISTORY_DIR as subdirectory of PAI_DIR
should export COMMANDS_DIR as subdirectory of PAI_DIR
should export STATE_DIR as subdirectory of PAI_DIR
should export THOUGHTS_DIR as subdirectory of QARA_DIR
should export MEMORY_DIR as subdirectory of THOUGHTS_DIR
should return path with year-month subdirectory
should use current date for path
should create directory if it does not exist
should not throw if directory already exists
should have validated PAI_DIR exists (module loaded successfully)
should skip empty lines and comments
should not overwrite existing environment variables
should warn when PAI_DIR does not exist (line 46)
should warn when HOOKS_DIR does not exist (line 48)
should not warn when both dirs exist
reports on unreferenced files and broken references
shows dependents for a known file
throws on unknown flag with value
throws on invalid size for gpt-image-1
throws on reference-image with non-nano model
throws on creative-variations out of range
throws on count out of range
handles spec with no context section
handles file with no scenarios section
handles scenario with missing priority (defaults to important)
ignores code blocks inside the format reference
should return help for empty args
parses failing tests with failure message
handles XML entities in test names
errors on compare without required args
affected exits 1 when no tests found
maps source file to co-located unit test
maps source file to co-located integration test
returns test file directly when changed file IS a test
adds to unmappedFiles when no test found
adds nonexistent test file to unmapped
scores full when all dirs present
returns empty findings when no skills dir
scores full for good context structure
returns empty array for nonexistent dir
parses valid SKILL.md with fork context
parses valid SKILL.md with same context
Rule C: -lib.ts whose stem.ts companion is covered
Rule D: -lib.ts imported by covered sibling with different name
Rule D: explicit .ts extension in import string
Rule D transitive: two-hop import chain to a covered CLI
non-lib file gets no transitive credit
returns correct days for past date
returns large number for old date
returns true when upstream is newer
returns false when installed is newer
shows empty message when no skills
returns full score when no issues
returns full score when no skills
all entries have minVersion and description
generates report with no CC version
does not recommend undetectable features when missing
does not detect modelRouting without per-agent model field
detects mergedSkillsCommands when both dirs exist
returns empty for entries with no features
returns empty when all versions are tracked
returns defaults when no config.json exists
falls back to 5173 with no scripts
falls back to 5173 when dir doesn't exist
uses start script if no dev script
returns 'bun run dev' when dev script exists
returns 'bun run start' when only start exists
returns 'bun run serve' when only serve exists
falls back to 'bun run dev' with no scripts
falls back when dir doesn't exist
computes ISO date from days lookback
computes unix timestamp from days lookback
returns results for a known topic
returns empty data for impossible query
outputs valid JSON with expected structure
scores well for comprehensive hook setup
scores high on qara (has enforcement hook, tdd-qa, state lib)
